creator: sada@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
New port of Japanized Netscape communicator-4.5 & mozilla-5.0.
	They depend on www/communicator-4.5 and www/mozilla.
	Resources are not perfect, ja-communicator's preference message is
	broken.
